arts.sum: Arsenal host Nottingham Forest at Emirates Stadium in London, with both sides on 19 points in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Arteta explains surprise Arsenal selection against Nottingham Forest as five changes made
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta made five changes to his starting lineup for Saturday’s Premier League meeting with Nottingham Forest. Declan Rice has been dropped to the bench and replaced by Mikel Merino, while Riccardo Calafiori returns after six weeks out to replace the injured Ben White. Kai Havertz has also been named on the bench despite starting […] The post Arteta explains surprise Arsenal selection against Nottingham Forest as five changes made first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta confirms Arsenal injury blow with shock team to face Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: Declan Rice is not in the Arsenal team to face Nottingham Forest today despite Mikel Arteta hinting that the midfielder was fit, although Bukayo Saka and Martin Odegaard are cleared to start

arts.ttl: Why Declan Rice isn't in the Arsenal starting XI vs Nottingham Forest amid Mikel Arteta decision
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta had hinted before the game though, that both Rice and Bukayo Saka - who also stayed at home instead of travelling with England - should be available for Saturday's clash at Emirates Stadium. Declan Rice has been left out of the Arsenal starting XI for their Premier League clash with Nottingham Forest.

arts.ttl: Arsenal-Nottingham Forest lineups confirmed as Declan Rice, Bukayo Saka decisions made
arts.sum: Declan Rice fails to make the starting lineup for Arsenal's Premier League clash with Nottingham Forest, but Bukayo Saka is in the first XI alongside Jorginho.

arts.ttl: Arsenal v Nottingham Forest, Premier League updates and more: football – live
arts.sum: Everton v Brentford, Aston Villa v Crystal Palace Follow updates from all 3pm games | Email Simon “A home defeat to Brentford is exactly the kind of result that appears on the record of a relegated club come May,” notes Gary Naylor. “So does Sean Dyche adopt his signature caution to avoid that, or does he see the match as an opportunity to lift the team and the fans before the Christmas fixtures, and go expansive? Frankly, sneaking a 1-0 with a deflected Michael Keane header from an 88th-minute corner would do me right now. Though I suspect I’m in a minority amongst Bluenoses.” This is the only photograph I’ve had through from Goodison Park today. I reckon that’s an expansive smile. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Nottingham Forest LIVE: Premier League team news, line-ups and more
arts.sum: Follow all the action from Emirates Stadium

arts.ttl: Arsenal make five surprise changes vs Forest LIVE!
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest are flying so high they are on Arsenal's radar. Fourth meets fifth in north London, with kick off between Arsenal and Nottingham Forest at 3pm.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid answer Arsenal transfer question as Edu replacement begins new contract talks - Jake Stokes
arts.sum: football.london says: "Arda Guler would have been an exciting signing for Arsenal, but he wouldn't play much more than he already does at Real Madrid – not even Ethan Nwaneri can get regular game time under Mikel Arteta! football.london says: "Nottingham Forest are no walkovers and Arsenal will need to be at their very best to win all three points this weekend.

arts.ttl: I was Arsenal hero but had more nights out than games after Nottm Forest move
arts.sum: Ramsey had been signed from Cardiff in 2008 but a double leg break had sidelined him for nine months and he needed to regain fitness. He would return to Arsenal before another loan spell this time at his beloved Cardiff before returning to the Gunners and pressing on.
